title: HeadDrop
description: killing a player now has a chance to drop his head with his name. With a 20% chance of dropping (the chance is configured by config.yml) these heads will become valuable trophies or additional collectibles for players.
body:
💀 JHeadDrop — Player Head Drop Plugin

  Adds a configurable chance for players to drop their head when killed.

JHeadDrop allows player heads to become collectible trophies, adding new
gameplay mechanics and rewards.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

✨ Features

💀 Player Head Drops

When a player is killed:

-   Their head has a chance to drop
-   Default drop chance: 20%
-   Drop chance is fully configurable
-   Heads contain the player name
-   Heads work as trophies or collectibles

------------------------------------------------------------------------

⚙️ Configurable Drop Chance

Example configuration:

    drop-chance: 20

You can adjust:

-   Drop chance percentage
-   Gameplay balance
-   Trophy rarity

------------------------------------------------------------------------

🔐 Permissions

    JHeadDrop.reload

Allows use of reload command

------------------------------------------------------------------------

🎮 Commands

    /jheaddrop

Reloads the plugin configuration

------------------------------------------------------------------------

📊 Statistics

bStats: https://bstats.org/plugin/bukkit/JHeadDrop/21866

------------------------------------------------------------------------
